# Nvex Media

## What We Do
Nvex Media is a digital growth agency specialising in two core services:
1. Lead Acquisition & Online Presence
2. 24/7 AI Receptionist

We help local businesses and SMEs capture more leads online and ensure every inbound call is answered — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week — using AI-powered voice technology.

## Services

### Lead Acquisition & Online Presence
We build and manage your full digital footprint — high-converting landing pages, websites, social media content and management, paid ad campaigns (Meta, Google, TikTok), lead capture forms, CRM integration, and monthly performance reporting.

### 24/7 AI Receptionist
An AI receptionist that answers every call, qualifies leads, handles FAQs, books appointments directly into your calendar, warm-transfers urgent calls, and sends automatic SMS follow-ups. Available every hour of every day including weekends and holidays.

### Full Growth System
Both services connected into one seamless pipeline. Leads captured online are instantly followed up by the AI receptionist. Missed calls trigger automatic SMS callbacks. All leads are tracked in a single dashboard with weekly performance summaries.

## Key Results
- 100% call answer rate — no missed calls
- 3× average increase in captured leads
- Live and operational within 5 days of sign-up
- Clients typically see ROI within the first 30 days

## Who We Help
Local businesses, trades, clinics, salons, real estate agents, and service businesses who are losing leads because calls go unanswered or their online presence isn't capturing enquiries.

Operating remotely, serving businesses globally.
